apis/deploy-adapter.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
# Optional: deploy fixture-backed source adapter APIs after local validation.
: "${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:?set GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT}"
SERVICE="${ADAPTER_SERVICE:-ge-source-adapters}"
REGION="${LOCATION:-us-central1}"
echo "Deploy $SERVICE to Cloud Run with mock_data/apis/openapi.json as the contract. Keep per-workspace routing isolated by workspace id."
apis/mcp-adapter/README.md:
# Source Adapter MCP

Generated from the GE use-case source map using the same shape as `mc-systems`: Express REST endpoints plus an MCP SSE server.

```bash
npm install
npm run build
npm start
```

The adapter is fixture-backed locally. Deploy it to Cloud Run only after validation and explicit approval.
apis/source-adapters.json:
{
  "id": "asc606_contract_analyzer_source_adapter_api",
  "generatedAt": "<TS>",
  "mode": "fixture_backed_service_adapter",
  "pattern": "mc-systems-compatible",
  "deploymentTargets": [
    "local Express API",
    "MCP SSE server",
    "Cloud Run",
    "API Gateway"
  ],
  "sources": [
    {
      "system": "Contract Repository",
      "protocol": "REST API",
      "direction": "read",
      "path": "/systems/contract_repository/read",
      "method": "GET",
      "dataPackage": "alloydb",
      "evidence": [
        "source_system_record",
        "generated_audit_trail"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "artifacts": {
    "openapi": "mock_data/apis/openapi.json",
    "adapterManifest": "mock_data/apis/source-adapters.json",
    "mcpManifest": "mock_data/apis/mcp-tools.json",
    "jsonFixtures": "mock_data/apis/fixtures/",
    "fixtureIndex": "mock_data/apis/fixtures/index.json",
    "mcpAdapter": "mock_data/apis/mcp-adapter/",
    "loadScript": "mock_data/apis/deploy-adapter.sh"
  }
}
olap/bigquery/load-bigquery.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
# Materialize Snowfakery output first, then load NDJSON/CSV into BigQuery.
bq --location "${LOCATION:-US}" mk --dataset "${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT}:${BQ_DATASET}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
olap/bigquery/package.yaml:
id: "bigquery-analytics-package"
datastore: "bigquery"
class: "OLAP"
sourceRecipe: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
systems:
  - "BigQuery"
entities:
  - "metric_snapshots"
  - "score_outputs"
  - "fact_events"
outputs:
  schemas: "mock_data/olap/bigquery/schemas/"
  ndjson: "mock_data/olap/bigquery/ndjson/"
  loadScript: "mock_data/olap/bigquery/load-bigquery.sh"
packageNotes: "BigQuery packager owns OLAP schemas, partitioning/clustering choices, facts, snapshots, and warehouse load files."
oltp/alloydb/load-alloydb.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
# Materialize Snowfakery output first, then load CSV/NDJSON into AlloyDB/PostgreSQL.
psql "$ALLOYDB_POSTGRES_DSN" -f mock_data/oltp/alloydb/schema.sql
oltp/alloydb/package.yaml:
id: "alloydb-operational-package"
datastore: "alloydb"
class: "OLTP"
sourceRecipe: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
systems:
  - "SAP S/4HANA SD"
  - "Contract Repository"
entities:
  - "vendors"
  - "invoices"
  - "journal_entries"
  - "payments"
  - "contract_repository_records"
outputs:
  ddl: "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/schema.sql"
  loadData: "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/seed.ndjson"
  loadScript: "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/load-alloydb.sh"
packageNotes: "AlloyDB packager owns SQL constraints, transactional source records, foreign keys, and audit tables."
oltp/alloydb/schema.sql:
-- Generated GE mock data AlloyDB/PostgreSQL schema.
-- Rows are generated from mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml.
create extension if not exists pgcrypto;

create table if not exists vendors (
  id text primary key,
  source_record_id text,
  name text,
  status text,
  created_at text,
  updated_at date,
  audit_trail text
);

create table if not exists invoices (
  id text primary key,
  source_record_id text,
  name text,
  status text,
  created_at text,
  updated_at date,
  audit_trail text
);

create table if not exists journal_entries (
  id text primary key,
  source_record_id text,
  name text,
  status text,
  created_at text,
  updated_at date,
  audit_trail text
);

create table if not exists payments (
  id text primary key,
  source_record_id text,
  name text,
  status text,
  created_at text,
  updated_at date,
  audit_trail text
);

create table if not exists contract_repository_records (
  id text primary key,
  source_record_id text,
  name text,
  status text,
  created_at text,
  updated_at date,
  audit_trail text
);
package-index.yaml:
id: "asc606_contract_analyzer_package_index"
generatedAt: "<TS>"
plan: "mock_data/plan/data-plan.yaml"
apis: "mock_data/apis/source-adapters.json"
packages:
  - 
    datastore: "alloydb"
    class: "OLTP"
    path: "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/package.yaml"
  - 
    datastore: "bigquery"
    class: "OLAP"
    path: "mock_data/olap/bigquery/package.yaml"
  - 
    datastore: "vertex_ai"
    class: "RUNTIME"
    path: "mock_data/plan/vertex_ai.package.yaml"
plan/data-plan.json:
{
  "id": "asc606_contract_analyzer",
  "title": "ASC 606 Contract Analyzer",
  "department": "finance",
  "generatedAt": "<TS>",
  "sourceSlide": "../../src/components/slides/use-cases/finance/ASC606ContractAnalyzer.tsx",
  "packBridges": [
    {
      "packId": "system_analytics",
      "simulatorArchetypes": [
        "data_platform",
        "digital_analytics",
        "planning_epm"
      ],
      "simulatorCollections": [
        "datasets",
        "tables",
        "pipelines",
        "jobs",
        "quality_checks",
        "events",
        "conversions"
      ],
      "materializes": "analytics tables, metric rows, forecasts, freshness signals, and quality checks into simulator seed overlays"
    },
    {
      "packId": "system_procurement_ops",
      "simulatorArchetypes": [
        "procurement",
        "supply_chain",
        "clm"
      ],
      "simulatorCollections": [
        "suppliers",
        "purchase_orders",
        "requisitions",
        "contracts",
        "approvals",
        "materials",
        "shipments",
        "risk_events",
        "agreements"
      ],
      "materializes": "supplier, spend, requisition, purchase order, contract, and supplier-risk rows into procurement simulator seeds"
    },
    {
      "packId": "system_finance_erp",
      "simulatorArchetypes": [
        "erp_finance",
        "tax_treasury",
        "planning_epm"
      ],
      "simulatorCollections": [
        "vendors",
        "invoices",
        "journal_entries",
        "payments",
        "bank_accounts",
        "payment_batches",
        "tax_filings",
        "forecast_lines"
      ],
      "materializes": "ledger, AP/AR, invoice, payment, cash, tax, and close-control rows into finance simulator seeds"
    }
  ],
  "taxonomy": [
    "OLTP",
    "OLTP_NOSQL",
    "OLAP",
    "UNSTRUCTURED_BLOB",
    "RUNTIME"
  ],
  "datastores": [
    {
      "id": "alloydb",
      "class": "OLTP",
      "primary": "AlloyDB for PostgreSQL",
      "systems": [
        "SAP S/4HANA SD",
        "Contract Repository"
      ],
      "entities": [
        "vendors",
        "invoices",
        "journal_entries",
        "payments",
        "contract_repository_records"
      ],
      "packager": "alloydb"
    },
    {
      "id": "bigquery",
      "class": "OLAP",
      "primary": "BigQuery",
      "systems": [
        "BigQuery"
      ],
      "entities": [
        "metric_snapshots",
        "score_outputs",
        "fact_events"
      ],
      "packager": "bigquery"
    },
    {
      "id": "vertex_ai",
      "class": "RUNTIME",
      "primary": "Vertex AI / ADK runtime",
      "systems": [
        "Vertex AI (Gemini)",
        "Vertex AI"
      ],
      "entities": [],
      "packager": "vertex_ai"
    }
  ],
  "sources": [
    {
      "system": "SAP S/4HANA SD",
      "description": "Sales orders, contract master, pricing conditions",
      "direction": "read",
      "protocol": "OData",
      "sourceKind": "operational_system",
      "target": {
        "class": "OLTP",
        "datastore": "alloydb",
        "primary": "AlloyDB for PostgreSQL",
        "fallback": "Cloud SQL PostgreSQL",
        "reason": "Operational source records need SQL constraints, joins, transactions, and update semantics."
      },
      "entities": [
        "vendors",
        "invoices",
        "journal_entries",
        "payments"
      ]
    },
    {
      "system": "Contract Repository",
      "description": "Signed contracts, SOWs, amendments, side letters",
      "direction": "read",
      "protocol": "REST API",
      "sourceKind": "operational_system",
      "target": {
        "class": "OLTP",
        "datastore": "alloydb",
        "primary": "AlloyDB for PostgreSQL",
        "fallback": "Cloud SQL PostgreSQL",
        "reason": "Operational source records need SQL constraints, joins, transactions, and update semantics."
      },
      "entities": [
        "contract_repository_records"
      ]
    },
    {
      "system": "BigQuery",
      "description": "Historical contract analyses, SSP data, precedent treatments",
      "direction": "bidirectional",
      "protocol": "BigQuery SQL",
      "sourceKind": "analytics_warehouse",
      "target": {
        "class": "OLAP",
        "datastore": "bigquery",
        "primary": "BigQuery",
        "fallback": "BigQuery external table over Cloud Storage",
        "reason": "Metrics, feeds, model outputs, snapshots, and analytical facts belong in columnar warehouse storage."
      },
      "entities": [
        "metric_snapshots",
        "score_outputs",
        "fact_events"
      ]
    },
    {
      "system": "Vertex AI (Gemini)",
      "description": "Contract language interpretation, ASC 606 application, memo drafting",
      "direction": "bidirectional",
      "protocol": "gRPC",
      "sourceKind": "ai_or_model",
      "target": {
        "class": "RUNTIME",
        "datastore": "vertex_ai",
        "primary": "Vertex AI / ADK runtime",
        "fallback": "Local mock model response fixtures",
        "reason": "AI/model systems are execution dependencies, not source-data stores."
      },
      "entities": []
    },
    {
      "system": "Vertex AI",
      "description": "Declared on UseCaseSlide systems prop.",
      "direction": "read",
      "protocol": "unknown",
      "sourceKind": "ai_or_model",
      "target": {
        "class": "RUNTIME",
        "datastore": "vertex_ai",
        "primary": "Vertex AI / ADK runtime",
        "fallback": "Local mock model response fixtures",
        "reason": "AI/model systems are execution dependencies, not source-data stores."
      },
      "entities": []
    }
  ],
  "apiContracts": [
    {
      "system": "Contract Repository",
      "protocol": "REST API",
      "direction": "read",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/systems/contract_repository/read",
      "targetRuntime": "Cloud Run/API Gateway optional; local ADK source adapter by default"
    }
  ],
  "packagers": {
    "snowfakery": {
      "input": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
      "output": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "owns": "Large sample-set realization from the canonical scenario graph",
      "requiredForScale": true
    },
    "alloydb": {
      "input": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/",
      "owns": "OLTP SQL DDL, constraints, COPY/insert files, load script"
    },
    "firestore": {
      "input": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/oltp/firestore/",
      "owns": "document JSON, collection mapping, batch write/import script"
    },
    "bigtable": {
      "input": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/oltp/bigtable/",
      "owns": "row-key strategy, column-family mapping, mutation JSON, load script"
    },
    "bigquery": {
      "input": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/olap/bigquery/",
      "owns": "schemas, NDJSON/CSV load files, dataset/table manifest"
    },
    "gcs": {
      "input": "mock_data/blobs/manifest.yaml",
      "output": "mock_data/blobs/gcs/",
      "owns": "PDF/DOCX/Markdown/blob objects, checksums, GCS URI manifest"
    },
    "api": {
      "input": "fixtures/manifest.json",
      "output": "mock_data/apis/",
      "owns": "OpenAPI contract, fixture-backed service adapter routing, optional Cloud Run/API Gateway deployment notes"
    },
    "simulator": {
      "input": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json + mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/simulators/",
      "owns": "System projections and seed overlays for registry-backed stateful simulators; large collections are realized through Snowfakery"
    }
  },
  "dataRealizers": [
    {
      "id": "snowfakery",
      "requiredForScale": true,
      "input": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
      "recipe": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
      "output": "mock_data/snowfakery/output/",
      "runCommand": "uv run --with snowfakery --with 'setuptools<81' snowfakery mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml --output-format csv --output-folder mock_data/snowfakery/output",
      "purpose": "Generate large, relationally coherent sample datasets from the scenario graph."
    },
    {
      "id": "simulator-seed-materializer",
      "requiredForSimulators": true,
      "input": "mock_data/snowfakery/output/",
      "output": "mock_data/simulators/",
      "runCommand": "node apps/factory/scripts/materialize-simulator-seeds.mjs --dir <workspace>",
      "purpose": "Map large Snowfakery row sets into simulator seed collections using graph-derived seed plans."
    }
  ],
  "package": {
    "root": "mock_data",
    "plan": "mock_data/plan/data-plan.yaml",
    "scenarioGraph": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
    "snowfakery": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml",
    "cloud": "mock_data/cloud/",
    "blobs": "mock_data/blobs/",
    "apis": "mock_data/apis/",
    "simulators": "mock_data/simulators/"
  },
  "simulatorSeeds": [
    {
      "simulatorId": "sap_s4hana_mm",
      "sourceSystems": [
        "SAP S/4HANA SD"
      ],
      "seedOverlay": "mock_data/simulators/sap_s4hana_mm/seed.json",
      "sourceGraph": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
      "sourceRecipe": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    },
    {
      "simulatorId": "bigquery",
      "sourceSystems": [
        "BigQuery"
      ],
      "seedOverlay": "mock_data/simulators/bigquery/seed.json",
      "sourceGraph": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
      "sourceRecipe": "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    }
  ],
  "scenarioGraph": {
    "path": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json",
    "nodes": 59,
    "edges": 106,
    "datastores": [
      {
        "datastore": "alloydb",
        "class": "OLTP",
        "nodes": 14,
        "systems": [
          "SAP S/4HANA SD",
          "Contract Repository"
        ]
      },
      {
        "datastore": "bigquery",
        "class": "OLAP",
        "nodes": 8,
        "systems": [
          "BigQuery"
        ]
      },
      {
        "datastore": "vertex_ai",
        "class": "RUNTIME",
        "nodes": 7,
        "systems": [
          "Vertex AI (Gemini)",
          "Vertex AI"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "snowfakeryRealization": {
    "path": "mock_data/snowfakery/realization-plan.json",
    "objects": 28,
    "controlledBy": "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
  }
}
plan/data-plan.yaml:
id: "asc606_contract_analyzer"

sources:
  - 
    system: "SAP S/4HANA SD"

    direction: "read"

    sourceKind: "operational_system"
    target:
      class: "OLTP"

    target:

    direction: "read"

    targetRuntime: "Cloud Run/API Gateway optional; local ADK source adapter by default"
packagers:
  snowfakery:
    input: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
    output: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    owns: "Large sample-set realization from the canonical scenario graph"
    requiredForScale: true

    input: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/oltp/alloydb/"
    owns: "OLTP SQL DDL, constraints, COPY/insert files, load script"

    input: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/oltp/firestore/"
    owns: "document JSON, collection mapping, batch write/import script"
  bigtable:
    input: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/oltp/bigtable/"
    owns: "row-key strategy, column-family mapping, mutation JSON, load script"
  bigquery:
    input: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/olap/bigquery/"
    owns: "schemas, NDJSON/CSV load files, dataset/table manifest"
  gcs:
    input: "mock_data/blobs/manifest.yaml"
    output: "mock_data/blobs/gcs/"
    owns: "PDF/DOCX/Markdown/blob objects, checksums, GCS URI manifest"
  api:
    input: "fixtures/manifest.json"
    output: "mock_data/apis/"
    owns: "OpenAPI contract, fixture-backed service adapter routing, optional Cloud Run/API Gateway deployment notes"
  simulator:
    input: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json + mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/simulators/"
    owns: "System projections and seed overlays for registry-backed stateful simulators; large collections are realized through Snowfakery"
dataRealizers:
  - 
    id: "snowfakery"
    requiredForScale: true
    input: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
    recipe: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
    output: "mock_data/snowfakery/output/"
    runCommand: "uv run --with snowfakery --with 'setuptools<81' snowfakery mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml --output-format csv --output-folder mock_data/snowfakery/output"
    purpose: "Generate large, relationally coherent sample datasets from the scenario graph."
  - 
    id: "simulator-seed-materializer"
    requiredForSimulators: true
    input: "mock_data/snowfakery/output/"
    output: "mock_data/simulators/"
    runCommand: "node apps/factory/scripts/materialize-simulator-seeds.mjs --dir <workspace>"
    purpose: "Map large Snowfakery row sets into simulator seed collections using graph-derived seed plans."
package:
  root: "mock_data"
  plan: "mock_data/plan/data-plan.yaml"
  scenarioGraph: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
  snowfakery: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
  cloud: "mock_data/cloud/"
  blobs: "mock_data/blobs/"
  apis: "mock_data/apis/"
  simulators: "mock_data/simulators/"
simulatorSeeds:
  - 
    simulatorId: "sap_s4hana_mm"
    sourceSystems:
      - "SAP S/4HANA SD"
    seedOverlay: "mock_data/simulators/sap_s4hana_mm/seed.json"
    sourceGraph: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
    sourceRecipe: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
  - 
    simulatorId: "bigquery"
    sourceSystems:
      - "BigQuery"
    seedOverlay: "mock_data/simulators/bigquery/seed.json"
    sourceGraph: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
    sourceRecipe: "mock_data/snowfakery/structured.recipe.yml"
scenarioGraph:
  path: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
  nodes: 59
  edges: 106
  datastores:
    - 
      datastore: "alloydb"
      class: "OLTP"
      nodes: 14
      systems:
        - "SAP S/4HANA SD"
        - "Contract Repository"
    - 
      datastore: "bigquery"
      class: "OLAP"
      nodes: 8
      systems:
        - "BigQuery"
    - 
      datastore: "vertex_ai"
      class: "RUNTIME"
      nodes: 7
      systems:
        - "Vertex AI (Gemini)"
        - "Vertex AI"
snowfakeryRealization:
  path: "mock_data/snowfakery/realization-plan.json"
  objects: 28
  controlledBy: "mock_data/scenario/scenario-graph.json"
plan/vertex_ai.package.yaml:
id: "vertex_ai-package"
datastore: "vertex_ai"
class: "RUNTIME"
systems:
  - "Vertex AI (Gemini)"
  - "Vertex AI"
entities:
  []
packageNotes: "Runtime dependencies are recorded in the plan but are not source-data packages."

# Canonical Snowfakery recipe for structured mock rows.

- snowfakery_version: 3

# graph_node_ids: ["concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_finance","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_ledger","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_budget","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_approval","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_procurement","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_supplier","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_purchase_order","concept_sap_s_4_hana_sd_contract"]

- object: vendors
  count: 25
  fields:
    id: "${{unique_id}}"
    source_record_id: "${{unique_id}}"
    name:
      fake: Company
    status:
      fake: Word
    created_at:
      date_between:
        start_date: "2025-01-01"
        end_date: "2026-12-31"
